text: Toronto. Library of Congress Cataloging-in-Publication Data Park, Barbara. Junie B. Jones and a little monkey business / Barbara Park; illustrated by Denise Brunkus. p. cm. “A first stepping stone book.” SUMMARY: Through a misunderstanding, Junie B. thinks that her new baby brother is really a baby monkey, and her report of this news creates excitement and trouble in her kindergarten class. eISBN: 978-0-307-75477-6 [1. Babies—Fiction. 2. Brothers and sisters—Fiction. 3. Kindergarten—Fiction. 4. Schools—Fiction.] I. Brunkus, Denise, ill. II. Title. PZ7.P2197Jt 1993 [Fic]—dc20 92-56706 v3.0
